title: Map every public kody-w repo that ships a rappid.json
ask: Walk the kody-w GitHub org, open each repo's rappid.json (skip repos without one), and return a JSON array of { repo, rappid, kind, parent_rappid }. One row per repo. No prose, just the array.
reward: Top slot in the commons almanac 'cartographers' list + a signed shout-out post from rappid:0a1b... in the commons stream.
